site.name: SceneMax3D
site.tagline: Create 3D games with a friendly visual studio and readable scripting language.
site.description: SceneMax3D is a visual 3D game creation studio with approachable scripting, animation workflows, physics, effects, AI-assisted tools, and publishing support.

hero.title: Build 3D games faster with SceneMax3D
hero.subtitle: A visual game creation studio with a choreographic programming language, animation tools, physics, effects, AI-assisted workflows, and publishing support.

heroCarousel.title: Build scenes directly in the studio
heroCarousel.description: Place characters, props, cameras, and gameplay objects while the live 3D view keeps every change concrete.
heroCarousel.imageAlt: SceneMax3D visual scene editor showing a fighting game level and object hierarchy

heroCarousel.title: Turn ideas into game logic
heroCarousel.description: Write compact SceneMax code beside the preview, then see movement, cameras, and character behavior respond.
heroCarousel.imageAlt: SceneMax3D code editor with a character preview running next to readable script

heroCarousel.title: Shape character-driven action
heroCarousel.description: Import models, chain animations, preview poses, and build fighting, platforming, or adventure moments faster.
heroCarousel.imageAlt: SceneMax3D fighting game preview with two animated characters in combat

heroCarousel.title: Make gameplay feel responsive
heroCarousel.description: Tune collisions, hit reactions, UI feedback, audio cues, and scene effects until the game loop feels playable.
heroCarousel.imageAlt: SceneMax3D gameplay preview with fighting UI, health bars, and combat action

heroCarousel.title: Prepare builds for players
heroCarousel.description: Package complete projects for desktop targets and keep the path from prototype to playable build straightforward.
heroCarousel.imageAlt: SceneMax3D package and deploy dialog for desktop build targets

creatorAudiences.title: Beginners
creatorAudiences.description: Start with visual scene building, friendly examples, and a choreographic scripting.

creatorAudiences.title: Indie developers
creatorAudiences.description: Prototype character controllers, cameras, collisions, UI, effects, and game events quickly.

creatorAudiences.title: Teachers
creatorAudiences.description: The only studio with built-in virtual classrooms for teaching from remote.

creatorAudiences.title: Creators
creatorAudiences.description: Import models, reuse animations, build levels, and package playable projects.

features.title: Visual Scene Designer
features.description: Build scenes visually, place objects, control cameras, configure components, and preview game flow.

features.title: SceneMax Language
features.description: Write readable game logic with events, conditions, functions, and beginner-friendly structure.

features.title: Animation Import and Retargeting
features.description: Import models and animations, reuse animation assets, and shape character-driven gameplay.

features.title: Physics and Collisions
features.description: Add rigid bodies, triggers, collision responses, and tactile world interactions.

features.title: UI System
features.description: Create menus, heads-up displays, labels, buttons, and game-state feedback.

features.title: Audio and Effects
features.description: Layer sound, visual effects, lighting, and moment-to-moment feedback into your scenes.

features.title: AI Console / MCP Integration
features.description: Use AI-assisted workflows to inspect projects, generate ideas, and speed up common studio tasks.

features.title: Packaging and Publishing
features.description: Prepare builds, export playable projects, and publish your game when it is ready.

languagePreview.title: Readable scripting for visible game logic
languagePreview.description: SceneMax3D is a textual, choreography-first programming language for 3D games, combining actor actions, timed motion, async orchestration, reactive state events, and collision handlers in a syntax designed to read like scene direction.
languagePreview.code:
var score = 0
player => ninja; coin => coin
when key W is pressed do
  player.move forward 0.1 in 0.1 seconds async
  player.walk
end do 

when player collides with coin do
  score = score + 1
  coin.delete
end do

showcase.title: Dragon Gate
showcase.description: A planned sample project slot for a complete SceneMax3D game walkthrough.

showcase.title: Starter Platformer
showcase.description: A small complete-game example for cameras, movement, collisions, UI, and packaging.

showcase.title: Animation Lab
showcase.description: A focused demo for GLTF, FBX, Mixamo workflows, and animation reuse.
